---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Moat
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## 💡 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## 🎯 Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve?

> Example: "When I use AI tools, I always struggle with..."

## 💭 Proposed Solution

How should this feature work?

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

What other solutions have you considered?

## 📊 Use Case

Who would benefit from this feature?

- **Who**: [e.g. AI coding users, team leads]
- **When**: [e.g. during code review, before commit]
- **Why**: [e.g. to prevent specific type of bugs]

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

- [ ] I have searched existing feature requests
- [ ] I have read the documentation
- [ ] This feature aligns with Moat's goal (preventing AI from breaking codebases)
